User agreement

This agreement explains the basic rules for using Brikaya.

Last updated: 2026-07-16

Play How to play FAQ About Legal Privacy Terms Data deletion Support

Acceptance

You accept this agreement when you access, install, or play Brikaya.

If you do not agree, stop using the game and remove any saved copy from your device.

Player conduct

Use Brikaya in a way that is lawful, respectful, and does not disrupt the game or public site.

Local data

The game may save scores, settings, and consent choices locally on your device. You can clear this data from the game menu or browser settings.

Updates

The agreement may be updated when the game changes. The latest version appears on this page.
